articles.description: Joseph Duggar is currently in solitary confinement in an Arkansas jail as he awaits extradition to Florida, where he is facing child molestation charges.
articles.content:
Joseph Duggar must be counting the minutes in jail.
Entertainment Weekly has confirmed the 31-year-old former reality star is being held in solitary confinement at the Washington County Detention Ce… [+2689 chars]
